info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Log Analytics Query Packs
info.description: Azure Log Analytics API reference for Query Packs management.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Operations

request.description: Lists all of the available insights REST API operations.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Insights error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Querypacks

request.description: Gets a list of all Log Analytics QueryPacks within a subscription.

response.name: A list containing 0 or more Log Analytics QueryPack definitions.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Querypacks Querypackname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Log Analytics QueryPack resource.

response.name: Successful request when deleting a Log Analytics QueryPack.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The specified QueryPack does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Querypacks Querypackname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Log Analytics QueryPack resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Querypacks Querypackname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Log Analytics QueryPack resource.

request.description: Creates (or updates) a Log Analytics QueryPack. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.

response.name: Successful request when creating or updating a Log Analytics QueryPack. The updated QueryPack is returned.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Querypacks Querypackname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Log Analytics QueryPack resource.

request.description: Updates an existing QueryPack's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.

response.name: Updating the Log Analytics QueryPack's tags was successful. QueryPack tags are updated and returned with the rest of the QueryPack's object properties.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Operationalinsights Querypacks

request.description: Gets a list of Log Analytics QueryPacks within a resource group.

response.name: A list containing 0 or more Log Analytics QueryPack definitions.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
